\tzpentry{ID3801}{Phase Closure Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3801 introduces Phase Closure Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} K_{J,i} = \kappa_J\, \frac{1}{\big(|r_i-r_J|+\varepsilon\big)^3}, \label{eq:jupiter_coupling} \end{equation}
